# Aadikarta

> India's trusted online marketplace for verified Vedic astrologers, tarot readers, and numerologists.

Aadikarta provides live chat consultations starting from ₹10/min. We bridge ancient Vedic wisdom with modern life, providing authentic astrological guidance.

## Services
- Vedic Astrology
- Kundli Matching
- Tarot Reading
- Love Advice
- Daily Horoscope
- Vastu Shastra

## Features
- Verified Astrologers
- Secure & Private Chat
- 100% Confidentiality

Website: https://aadikarta.org
